name: 死亡威脅懸念
description: 女主每一次任務都伴隨著明確的死亡威脅，形成持續的生存壓迫感。觀眾被鎖定在'她能不能活下來'的核心懸念中，無法離開。選秀被淘汰＝死、無法勸太子吃飯＝死、得罪皇后＝死，層層疊加。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: If you stay, you will have a boundless future. If you don't stay, it will be the end of you. ... If you leave this place, it means death. I'm doomed either way, so I might as well go for it.
